neighbors.name: Josue & Diana Flores
neighbors.claims: Josue and Diana Flores are associated with a parcel at 375 W Buffalo Ln in Huachuca City, which is also the registered address for "J & D Roll Off & Hauling" ([FMCSA](https://safer.fmcsa.dot.gov/query.asp?searchtype=ANY&query_type=queryCarrierSnapshot&query_param=USDOT&query_string=2345532)). The property is classified as industrial or commercial land in some listings ([LoopNet](https://www.loopnet.com/property/375-w-buffalo-ln-huachuca-city-az-85616/04003-10606019A/)). No public meeting minutes or news articles were found that mention the couple’s views on area development or community issues.
neighbors.influence_justification: Local business owners (J & D Roll Off)

approach_recommendations.engage: The Flores family appears to operate a local hauling business from the property. Approach with a focus on how project construction might interact with their business operations and road access.

citations.claim: Associated with J & D Roll Off & Hauling at 375 W Buffalo Ln

neighbors.name: Loren J. Sheldon
neighbors.claims: Loren J. Sheldon is the operator of the Whetstone Pit, a surface metal mine specializing in sand and gravel ([MinesDatabase](https://minesdatabase.com/mines/view/203001)). He has also operated L. Sheldon & Trucking Company, a heavy equipment business, for over 20 years ([Arizona Daily Independent](https://arizonadailyindependent.com/2021/03/07/four-federal-agents-accused-in-lawsuit-of-fabricating-evidence-and-false-statements/)). Sheldon has been involved in litigation against federal agents regarding investigations into his business operations, which were ultimately dismissed ([Arizona Daily Independent](https://arizonadailyindependent.com/2021/03/07/four-federal-agents-accused-in-lawsuit-of-fabricating-evidence-and-false-statements/)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage Sheldon via a technical liaison who can address infrastructure and drainage plans. His history as a heavy equipment operator suggests he will have specific technical concerns regarding road use and site grading.

citations.claim: Operator of Whetstone Pit (sand and gravel)

neighbors.name: Richard E. & Julia Ann Wilson
neighbors.claims: Richard E. and Julia Ann Wilson are listed as owners of a residential parcel at 2031 W Cougar Pl, Huachuca City ([Compass](https://www.compass.com/homedetails/2031-W-Cougar-Pl-Huachuca-City-AZ-85616/W1LBH_pid/)). As of January 2026, the property is listed for sale and is in 'Pending' status ([SellMyTucsonHome](https://www.sellmytucsonhome.com/homes-for-sale/AZ/huachuca_city/85616/2031_w_cougar_place/bid-83-22520862)). They do not appear in local news reports or public meeting records regarding development.

approach_recommendations.engage: The property appears to be in the process of being sold. Verify current ownership before outreach. If the Wilsons are still the owners, approach with awareness that they may be exiting the community.

neighbors.name: Donald Franz
neighbors.claims: Donald Franz is a landowner at 255 W Buffalo Ln, Huachuca City ([Zillow](https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/255-W-Buffalo-Ln-Huachuca-City-AZ-85616/7398964_zpid/)). He is a pastor and the founder of 'Fortaleciendo Familias' (Strengthening Families), a non-profit ministry focused on family restoration ([Enfoque a la Familia](https://www.enfoquealafamilia.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Perfil-Profesional-Donald-Franz.pdf)). He is also a licensed amateur radio operator (Call sign AA0Y) ([QRZCQ](https://www.qrzcq.com/call/AA0Y)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Mr. Franz is a religious leader with a focus on family values. Approach with respect for his community role. His ministry work suggests he may value community stability and family legacy.

citations.title: 255 W Buffalo Ln, Huachuca City, AZ 85616
